task: Install conservative edu tier3 free-tier launchd backlog drain

governance_bootstrap.summary: Production automation changes require concrete runtime verification and residual risk reporting.
Mac Mini launchd automation must follow source-of-truth deployment and real runtime checks before closeout.

problem: After the free-tier runner and candidate gate passed a 10-item sample, there was still no separate launchd job to drain edu_consulting tier3 backlog using the free Gemini key.
fix: Added com.harness.edu-tier3-free LaunchAgent with --free-tier --limit 40, one-hour interval, RunAtLoad, dedicated logs, and register_launchd.sh inclusion. Existing paid com.harness.tier3-filter is left unchanged.

verification.name: macmini launchd install and first run
verification.result: residual risk: LaunchAgent loaded and RunAtLoad executed, but first 40-item run completed 정제 16 / 스킵 24 / 실패 0, so the job was booted out before the next hourly run

verification.name: macmini launchd off check
verification.command: launchctl list | grep com.harness.edu-tier3-free || true; test -f ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.harness.edu-tier3-free.plist
verification.result: pass: plist remains installed, but launchctl list has no loaded com.harness.edu-tier3-free job

remaining_verification: LaunchAgent is installed but intentionally left unloaded. Re-enable only after the candidate gate reaches skip rate below 50 percent on a fresh --free-tier --limit 10 sample.
